SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION HEARING SET FOR NOV-04-2021 IS VACATED. SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ON OCTOBER 19, 2021.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORDOBA JORI, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE MORAN, ALONDRA $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $320.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
